Text: api services in niche verticals i absolutely love:

- gptzero: detect if content is ai-generated
- PDFgen: generate a pdf
- logo dev: get company logo
- 1lookup: validate phone numbers
- emailable: validate email addresses
- ipapi: get the ip address
- bannerbear: generate images
- screenshotone: generate screenshots
- firecrawl: turn a url into clean text for llms
- deepgram: transcribe audio to text
- removebg: remove image backgrounds
- e2b: run untrusted code in a sandbox
- svix: send outbound webhooks with retries
- mindee: extract data from receipts and invoices
- resend: send transactional email
- cloudconvert: convert files between formats
- tinypng: compress images
- quickchart: generate charts from data
- geocodio: convert addresses to coordinates
- hunter: find email addresses from a domain

